0.16.0- Amounts for shares are expressed in the share token's smallest units (10^decimals) - `priceUsdPerShare` must be provided in USD scaled to 8 decimals (1e8) per 1 full share (10^shareDecimals)   e.g. `$5` should be passed as `5 * 100_000_000`   If you start from a payment token amount with `d` decimals (e.g. USDC has 6), convert with   `priceUsdPerShare = tokenAmount * 10^(8 - d)` so the value matches Chainlink's 1e8 pricing - Prices are converted to payment tokens using Chainlink oracles at purchase time - For role values, see Governance.sol buy(uint256,uint256,address,address,uint.details: Requires ERC20 allowance for the calculated payment amount. Mints shares to `_to` on success.Payment token must be allowlisted and have an oracle configured.

params._maxPayment: Maximum payment token amount willing to pay (slippage protection)
params._paymentToken: The payment token to use for this purchase (must be allowlisted with oracle)

createSale(address,address[],address,uin.details: Requires SALES_OPERATOR_ROLEReverts if `_deadline <= block.timestamp`, `_saleSupply == 0`, `_priceUsdPerShare == 0`, or `_paymentTokensAllowed` is emptyAll payment tokens in `_paymentTokensAllowed` must be globally allowlisted and have oracles configured

params._paymentTokensAllowed: ERC20 payment tokens allowed for this sale (must be non-empty and all allowlisted with oracles)
params._priceUsdPerShare: USD price per 1 full share (10^shareDecimals), 8 decimals (1e8)
params._share: ERC-3643 share address (manager must be agent on this token)

returns.paused: Whether the contract is globally paused

fulfillFiatOrder(uint256,uint256,address.details: Requires FIAT_ORDER_ROLEMints and updates accounting; applicable compliance checks still apply via token

returns.totalSupply: Total supply allocated for this sale

returns.aggregator: The Chainlink aggregator address, or address(0) if not set

returns._0: sold Total minted amount via this sale so far

returns.paymentTokensAllowed: The ERC20 payment tokens allowed for this sale
returns.priceUsdPerShare: USD price per 1 full share (10^shareDecimals), 8 decimals (1e8)

params.allowed: True to allow, false to disallow

setMaxOracleDelaySeconds(uint256).details: Requires SALES_CONFIG_ROLEStale prices beyond this delay will revert purchases

setPaymentTokenOracle(address,address).details: Requires SALES_CONFIG_ROLESet aggregator to address(0) to remove

params.aggregator: The Chainlink AggregatorV3Interface address (address(0) to remove)

unsetEmergencyPause().details: Requires SALES_OPERATOR_ROLEWhen paused, all buy() and fulfillFiatOrder() operations are blockedFunctions are split to enable different delays for each function / function setEmergencyPause() external; /**Requires SALES_OPERATOR_ROLE

params._newDeadline: The new deadline timestamp (must be in the future)

updateSalePaymentTokensAllowed(uint256,a.details: Requires SALES_OPERATOR_ROLEAll tokens in `_newPaymentTokensAllowed` must be globally allowlisted and have oracles configured

params._newPaymentTokensAllowed: The new list of payment tokens allowed for this sale

params._newPriceUsdPerShare: The new USD price per share (1e8) for a full share (10^shareDecimals)

withdrawFunds(address[],address,uint256[.details: Requires FUNDS_ADMIN_ROLEOnly allowlisted tokens can be withdrawn

params.amounts: Amounts to withdraw per token; must match `tokens.length`
params.tokens: The ERC20 token addresses (must be allowlisted)

buy(uint256,uint256,address,address,uint.notice: Buy shares from an active sale

createSale(address,address[],address,uin.notice: Create a new sale for a given ERC-3643 token

emergencyPaused().notice: Get the current global emergency pause state

fulfillFiatOrder(uint256,uint256,address.notice: Fulfill an off-chain (fiat/OTC) order without ERC20 transfer

getSaleRemainingSupply(uint256).notice: Get the remaining supply available for a sale (smallest units)

getSaleTotalSupply(uint256).notice: Get the total supply allocated for a sale (smallest units)

isPaymentTokenAllowed(address).notice: Returns whether a payment token is allowlisted

maxOracleDelaySeconds().notice: Get the maximum allowed oracle delay in seconds

pauseSale(uint256).notice: Pause a sale (can be resumed with `unpauseSale`)

paymentTokenToUsdAggregator(address).notice: Get the oracle aggregator address for a payment token

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Recover any ERC20 mistakenly sent to this contract

saleCount().notice: Returns the total number of sales created so far

saleIdToSold(uint256).notice: Total amount sold for a sale (smallest units)

sales(uint256).notice: Returns the sale configuration and current state

setAllowedPaymentToken(address,bool).notice: Allow or disallow a payment token for use in new sales (allowlist is always enforced)

setMaxOracleDelaySeconds(uint256).notice: Set the maximum allowed delay for oracle price updates

setPaymentTokenOracle(address,address).notice: Set or update the Chainlink oracle aggregator for a payment token

unsetEmergencyPause().notice: Pause all sales immediatelyUnpause all sales

updateSaleFundsRecipient(uint256,address.notice: Update the funds recipient for a sale
